user.title: Eau du Grand Lyon
user.description: Enter your credentials from the customer portal at agence.eaudugrandlyon.com

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your email address and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Eau du Grand Lyon server.

init.title: Settings
init.description: Schedules are in local time (e.g. 08:00 = 8 AM Paris time). The all-inclusive rate can be calculated from your bill: Total incl. tax ÷ m³ consumed.

error.invalid_time_format: Invalid format. Use HH:MM, for example 08:00 or 16:30.
error.same_times: The two schedules must be different.
